title: Executive Order 13080—American Heritage Rivers Initiative Advisory Committee

flags.justification: Up to twenty members, purely advisory, recommending rivers for presidential designation with no operational authority.
Extremely detailed, specific evaluation criteria across many enumerated sub-factors (Sec. 2).
Multiple related evaluation criteria all coherently serve one purpose: river nomination review.
A purely advisory body with no compliance regime against third parties.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
Sec. 4 sets an explicit termination: no later than two years from the date of the order.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
A purely advisory body with independent membership.
A narrow, task-specific, time-limited advisory function for river designation; no ongoing or expansive authority is claimed.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (positive). Structural weight: 0/12 = 0.0%. Another exemplary time-limited advisory commission.
